The '''Merson asteroid belt''' was an [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]], with a lot of minerals and metal veins, it was close to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Merson]]. It was located at the junction of several [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperroutes]].

Starliners passing through the field in the years surrounding the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] had to engage in silent running protocol to avoid detection by the [[Merson pirates/Legends|pirates]] from nearby Merson. Prior to the war, these pirates scuttled a liner carrying many [[Sy Myrthian/Legends|Sy Myrthians]] returning to [[Sy Myrth/Legends|Sy Myrth]] from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] as a result of their planet's secession from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

During the Clone Wars, [[Tap-Nar-Pal]] and [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] led Republic forces in orbit over Merson and in the [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] belt against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. [[Ronhar Kim]] led ground forces on Merson itself. The [[Battle of Merson|battle]] was set up by [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] to ensure the deaths of Kim and Tap-Nar-Pal, and Pellaeon was forced to withdraw from the conflict, leaving the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and the ground forces to their doom.

[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] later saved a luxury cruiser from being destroyed in the field by the Merson pirates.<ref name="marvel24">[[Star Wars (1977) 24|''Star Wars'' (1977) 24]]</ref>
